name: type: epic
description: Milestone or cross-cutting roadmap epic.

name: type: task
description: Concrete deliverable or implementation task.

name: area: product
description: Product doctrine, roadmap, or release planning.

name: area: content
description: Curriculum, question annotation, and content authoring.

name: area: domain
description: Core types, schemas, contracts, and state models.

name: area: map
description: Graph, map rendering, navigation, and spatial memory.

name: area: combat
description: Combat loop, bosses, damage, and retries.

name: area: pacing
description: Difficulty rhythm, tension, and recovery systems.

name: area: memory
description: Flashbacks, reclaim loops, and known-ground slips.

name: area: narrative
description: Story framing, mentor voice, and chapter progression.

name: area: telemetry
description: Events, analytics, dashboards, and balancing data.

name: area: audio
description: Audio cues, stings, and music integration.

name: area: qa
description: Balancing, QA, validation, and hardening.

name: area: release
description: Launch gates, repo setup, and release management.

name: priority: p0
description: Highest priority. Required to prove the core thesis.

name: priority: p1
description: Important but not on the immediate critical path.

name: priority: p2
description: Later roadmap work or supporting structure.

name: lane:spark-1
description: Spark lane 1: roadmap model ownership.

name: lane:spark-2
description: Spark lane 2: bootstrap script ownership.

name: lane:spark-3
description: Spark lane 3: CI ownership.

name: lane:spark-4
description: Spark lane 4: review and merge automation ownership.

name: lane:spark-5
description: Spark lane 5: governance and template ownership.

name: bot:overseer
description: Applied to overseer-owned coordination work.

name: bot:auto-review
description: Applied when auto-review is the active gate.
